text:
Created attachment 249727
Update to 2.0.1

Update to 2.0.1:
* Increase build verbosity
* Prefix Port with "ada-"
* Remove pkg-plist, most of the contents is now covered by ${PORTDOCS},
  the remaining 4 entries by ${PLIST_FILES}
